Skill.label: Pick up Domblow, level in offhand.

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE New Item Imperial Claw Crafted: true Prefix: None Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.408}LocalIncreasedAttackSpeed6 Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 1 {tags:resource,life,attack}Grants 46 Life per Enemy Hit 21% increased Attack Speed {tags:damage,minion}{custom}{range:0.5}Minions deal (83-94)% increased Damage {tags:skill,caster,gem}{crafted}Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Use a Skill, with a 8 second Cooldown {tags:skill,caster,gem}{crafted}Spells Triggered this way have 150% more Cost

Rarity: UNIQUE Legacy of Fury Wyrmscale Boots Armour: 433 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 433 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 League: Ritual Variant: Pre 3.17.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}(200-300)% increased Armour and Evasion {variant:1}{range:0.5}-(15-10)% to all Elemental Resistances 30% increased Movement Speed {variant:1}Drops Scorched Ground while moving, lasting 4 seconds {variant:2}Nearby Enemies are Scorched {range:0.5}(30-50)% increased Effect of Scorch {range:0.5}(30-40)% chance when you Kill a Scorched Enemy to Burn Each surrounding Enemy for 4 seconds, dealing 8% of the Killed Enemy's Life as Fire Damage per second

Input.name: customMods
Input.string:
=== Champ Ascendancy Changes === You are fortified Nearby Allies count as having fortification equal to yours 15% increased evasion rating and armour Enemies Taunted by you take 20% increased damage Enemies Taunted by you cannot evade attacks
=== AG Stuff === Nearby allies gain 68% increased damage Nearby enemies have 18% increased effect of curses on them Nearby Enemies are Scorched 40% increased Effect of Scorch
^4=== Tukohama Vanguard Fire Exposure === Nearby enemies have -25% fire resistance
